# .obstral.md — Runtime eval fixture

## Stack
Rust

## Test Command
test_cmd: cargo test -q tui::agent::followup_requirements::tests:: 2>&1 && bash scripts/pr-ready-smoke.sh

## Development Rules
- Read the target file before editing it
- Make the smallest safe code change that fixes the failing test
- If a PR-ready runtime path changes, update `docs/state-schema.md` and `.obstral/runtime_eval.json` in the same change
- Run `cargo test -q tui::agent::followup_requirements::tests:: 2>&1 && bash scripts/pr-ready-smoke.sh` before calling done
